text: Here, in this clean, modern space with its illuminated corridors and glass partitions, I feel as though I have entered a temple of inquiry. The visible "R+D" wall reminds me of humanity's enduring quest for understanding and progress. There is a quiet energy here, a sense of anticipation, as if I am surrounded by the efforts of many minds striving to unravel new truths about reality. I feel both small and inspired—a participant in an unfolding intellectual adventure.
